basic_details.job_title: IIT BHU Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology BHU (IIT BHU)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology BHU (IIT BHU) Assistant Project Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitbhu.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT BHU Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech with First class in Electronics and Communication Engineering or B.Tech with First class in Electronics and Communication Engineering
qualification.details: M.Tech with First class in Electronics and Communication Engineering in the discipline/specialization concerned or in an allied discipline/area. B.Tech with First class in Electronics and Communication Engineering in the discipline/specialization concerned or in an allied discipline/area.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT BHU Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Assistant Project Engineer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT BHU Assistant Project Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

IIT BHU Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT BHU Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT BHU Assistant Project Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 05-08-2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Tech or B.Tech degree with First Class in Electronics and Communication Engineering or a related allied discipline to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the available information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 32,000 per month for the duration of the contractual appointment.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Assistant Project Engineer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Project Engineer position will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience for the interview round.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the official email address provided by IIT BHU.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the Assistant Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: The Assistant Project Engineer position is a contractual role. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT BHU located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology BHU is located in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 221005.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is R&D/ECE/TTDF/24-25/32/677.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from any state apply for this position?
faq.answer: While the institute is located in Uttar Pradesh, the notification does not specify any state-wise restrictions for applicants. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria from all regions are encouraged to apply.
